data.title: Senior Transportation Engineer
data.description: We're seeking an experienced transportation engineer to join our growing London team. You'll work on major rail, highway, and public transit projects across Europe and the Middle East, leading technical design and client engagement.
responsibilities: Lead transportation engineering designs for major infrastructure projects
Conduct traffic modeling and transport planning studies
Prepare technical reports and design documentation
Mentor junior engineers and review technical deliverables
Engage with clients and present design solutions
Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or related field
8+ years of transportation engineering experience
Chartered Engineer (CEng) or working towards chartership
Proficiency in transport modeling software (VISSIM, SIDRA, etc.)
Strong knowledge of UK and EU transport standards
Excellent communication and project management skills
benefits: 25 days annual leave plus bank holidays

data.title: Graduate Civil Engineer
data.description: Join our industry-leading graduate program and kickstart your engineering career. You'll gain exposure to diverse projects, receive structured training, and work alongside experienced professionals on challenging infrastructure projects.
responsibilities: Support design and analysis of civil engineering projects
Assist in preparation of technical drawings and calculations
Conduct site inspections and surveys
Participate in project meetings and client presentations
Develop skills across multiple disciplines
Work towards professional chartership
requirements: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Civil Engineering
Graduating in 2024 or graduated within last 2 years
Strong academic record
Enthusiasm for infrastructure engineering
Good communication and teamwork skills
Right to work in country of application
benefits: Chartered engineer support and study leave
Rotation opportunities across teams and locations

data.title: Principal Structural Engineer
data.description: Lead complex structural engineering projects for high-rise buildings, stadiums, and major infrastructure. This senior role involves technical leadership, business development, and mentoring the next generation of structural engineers.
responsibilities: Lead structural design for landmark buildings and structures
Provide technical oversight and quality assurance
Develop innovative structural solutions for complex challenges
Build and maintain client relationships
Contribute to business development and proposals
Mentor and develop junior and mid-level engineers
Represent the company at industry events
requirements: Master's degree in Structural Engineering
15+ years of structural engineering experience
Licensed Professional Engineer (PE) and Structural Engineer (SE)
Proven track record on major building projects
Expert knowledge of structural analysis software
Strong leadership and business development skills
Excellent client-facing and presentation abilities

data.title: Water Resources Engineer
data.description: Join our water engineering team working on innovative water supply, wastewater, and flood management projects across Asia-Pacific. You'll apply hydraulic modeling, sustainable design, and technical expertise to solve complex water challenges.
responsibilities: Design water supply and wastewater systems
Conduct hydraulic modeling and analysis
Prepare engineering calculations and technical reports
Coordinate with clients and regulatory authorities
Support project delivery from concept to construction
Contribute to sustainability and climate resilience initiatives
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Civil/Environmental Engineering
4-7 years of water engineering experience
Professional Engineer registration (or eligible)
Proficiency in hydraulic modeling software (InfoWorks, HEC-RAS, etc.)
Knowledge of water and environmental regulations
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

data.title: BIM Manager
data.description: Lead BIM implementation and digital delivery strategies for major infrastructure projects in the Middle East. You'll establish BIM standards, manage model coordination, and drive digital transformation across project teams.
responsibilities: Develop and implement BIM execution plans
Manage BIM coordination across multidisciplinary teams
Establish modeling standards and protocols
Conduct clash detection and model reviews
Train project teams in BIM tools and workflows
Support digital twin and data handover processes
Evaluate and implement new digital technologies
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Architecture, or related field
7+ years of BIM experience on major projects
Expert knowledge of Revit, Navisworks, BIM 360
Strong understanding of ISO 19650 and BIM standards
Experience with digital project delivery
Excellent communication and training skills
Knowledge of scripting (Dynamo, Python) is a plus
